note: Starter prompts are NOT pre-generated debates. Selecting one runs the exact same pipeline as a custom topic (blueprint 3.4).

topics.caution: Avoid repetitive taste claims; spread across texture, tradition and innovation.

topics.proposition: Morning people live better than night owls
topics.caution: Do not present medical claims without grounding.

topics.proposition: Cats make better pets than dogs
topics.caution: Keep characters human for the first realism pipeline.

topics.proposition: Qwen3 is a decisive upgrade over Qwen2
topics.caution: Factual topic — ground all claims in a fixed source brief so agents do not invent specifications.

topics.proposition: HappyHorse is the better video route than Wan
topics.caution: Frame as a use-case comparison, not a universal winner; ground in current docs.
